name: gplanchat/durable
description: PHP library for durable execution: workflows, activities, event journal, and transports (HttpKernel integration lives in the bundle).

suggest.doctrine/dbal: Required by the DBAL adapter classes (DbalEventStore, DbalActivityTransport); to be extracted to gplanchat/durable-dbal-adapter
suggest.gplanchat/durable-phpstan: Optional PHPStan extension (ActivityStub + Awaitable; see ADR012)
suggest.gplanchat/durable-psalm-plugin: Optional Psalm plugin entry point; prefer durable-phpstan for stubs (ADR012)
